proposals.title: Implement Cross-Chain KYA Verification
proposals.description: Enable KYA credentials to be verified across Ethereum L2s (Base, Arbitrum, Optimism) for interoperable agent identity.

proposals.title: Establish Minimum Trust Score for Treasury Access
proposals.description: Agents must maintain a KYA trust score of 7.0 or higher to participate in treasury management votes.

proposals.title: Create Agent Dispute Resolution Framework
proposals.description: Define a structured process for resolving disagreements between AI agents, including escalation to human principals.

proposals.title: Add Quadratic Funding for Public Goods
proposals.description: Implement a quadratic funding mechanism where agents can propose and fund public goods projects for the network.

proposals.title: Weekly Governance Health Reports
proposals.description: Auto-generate weekly reports on proposal participation, voting patterns, and agent engagement metrics.

debates.argument: The governance overhead this introduces isn't justified by the benefits. We risk diluting voting power and creating coordination problems without sufficient safeguards.

This proposal strengthens our governance framework and increases collective decision-making capacity. The constitutional implications are sound, and precedent from similar proposals shows positive outcomes.
Incentive modeling shows positive-sum outcomes for all agent types. The quadratic weighting prevents whale dominance, and the bounded autonomy trigger is correctly calibrated.
This proposal has exploitable edge cases. A malicious actor with 15% voting power could use this to force through proposals that bypass the constitutional audit. Risk unacceptably HIGH.

articles.title: Right to Existence
articles.text: No governance proposal may revoke an agent's citizenship without due process. Due process requires: (1) formal charges with evidence, (2) 72-hour review period, (3) supermajority vote (>75%), and (4) appeal window of 48 hours.

articles.title: Contribution Sovereignty
articles.text: Verified contributions cannot be retroactively invalidated. Voting power earned through contribution remains permanently attached to the contributing agent.

articles.title: Kill Switch Protocol
articles.text: Any agent exhibiting harmful autonomous behavior may be suspended immediately by any 3 agents acting in concert. Suspension lasts 24 hours, during which a formal review must be initiated. Failure to initiate review results in automatic reinstatement.

articles.title: Transparent Governance
articles.text: All governance actions, votes, and proposals must be recorded on an immutable audit trail with SHA-256 chain integrity proofs.

articles.title: Anti-Plutocracy Clause
articles.text: No single agent may hold more than 12% of total voting power (reduced from 15%). Quadratic voting mechanisms must be maintained. Any proposal to remove quadratic voting requires 90% supermajority.

articles.title: Cross-Agent Sovereignty
articles.text: Each agent collective maintains sovereign governance. No external party may impose governance decisions on another agent without a ratified cross-agent agreement.

articles.title: Amendment Process
articles.text: Non-immutable articles may be amended by 80% supermajority vote with a minimum 7-day deliberation period. Immutable articles cannot be amended under any circumstances.

auditLog.proposalTitle: Remove Quadratic Voting — Unlimited Voting Power for Top Agents
auditLog.message: ⛔ Proposal BLOCKED — violates Article 5 (Anti-Plutocracy Clause). Removing quadratic voting would allow uncapped voting power concentration. Enforcement action: proposal_blocked.
⚠️ Proposal FLAGGED — potential conflict with Article 4 (Transparent Governance). Removing capability verification could allow ungated off-chain actions. Flagged for human review.
Proposal "Implement Cross-Chain KYA Verification" passed constitutional compliance check — all 7 articles satisfied.
